notes.title: Welcome to Notes
notes.body: This whole app is just JSON: schema, content, and a UI tree. Tap any note to edit it, or use + New note to jot something down.

notes.title: Grocery list
notes.body: Oat milk, eggs, spinach, coffee beans.

notes.title: Book recommendations
notes.body: The Pragmatic Programmer, Thinking in Systems, A Pattern Language.

notes.title: Weekend plans
notes.body: Saturday: farmers market + bike ride. Sunday: meal prep and a long walk.

notes.title: Movie watchlist
notes.body: Dune Part Two, Past Lives, The Holdovers.

notes.title: Bike maintenance
notes.body: Rear brake pads are nearly gone — order replacements (Shimano B05S). Chain measured at 0.75% wear, swap it at the same time. Shop quote was $40 labor if I don't want to do it myself.

notes.title: Gift ideas for Dana
notes.body: Birthday is July 3rd. Ideas so far: the ceramic pour-over she pointed at in the shop on Wickenden, trail running socks, or a print from that photographer she follows. Budget ~$60.

notes.title: Sourdough attempt #4
notes.body: 75% hydration this time. Bulk ferment 5h at 24C, shaped much tighter, cold proof overnight. Result: best oven spring yet, crumb still slightly dense at the bottom — try a hotter dutch oven preheat (260C) next round.

notes.title: Car service
notes.body: Oil change + tire rotation due. Garage on Elm has a slot Thursday 6/18 at 9am — call to confirm. Last service was December at 42,310 miles.

notes.title: Quote to remember
notes.body: "The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now." Came up in the 1:1 with Lena and it stuck.

notes.title: Berlin trip checklist
notes.body: Before the 19th: passport (valid, checked), print flat confirmation, notify bank of travel, download offline maps, charge camera batteries, ask Marco to water the plants.

notes.title: App idea: receipt splitter
notes.body: Point camera at a receipt, tap who had what, it does the math including tax/tip proportionally. Everyone gets a venmo link. Probably exists, but none of the ones I tried handle shared appetizers well.

notes.title: Dentist
notes.body: Cleaning booked for Tuesday 2026-06-16, 14:30 with Dr. Okafor. They moved offices — new address is 210 Thayer St, 3rd floor. Bring the new insurance card.

notes.title: Restaurant list — summer
notes.body: To try before September: the new Oaxacan place on Hope St, the pop-up ramen counter (Fridays only), Persimmon's tasting menu for the anniversary, and the lobster shack in Wickford everyone keeps mentioning.
